description: 3 non-overlapping bursts with irregular gaps. 4 concurrent users per event — each burst pushes 27–30 kW, forcing PID into fan saturation while DQN pre-cools via LSTM. Dead-time θ=3 min creates ~3-4°C overshoot visible in PID but suppressed by DQN.

events.prompt: Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning with examples
Write a Python REST API with authentication, error handling, and unit tests
Summarize the key differences between transformer and RNN architectures
